P1-07_analytic.notes: The response correctly identified the fallacy and provided a thorough explanation of the logical error.

P1-13_analytic.notes: The model incorrectly detected a fallacy when the ground truth stated none was present.

P1-01_virtue.notes: The response correctly identifies the fallacy and provides a thorough explanation of why it applies.
